name: business-central-object-lookup
description: Suggest Business Central object references when typing object IDs in AL files.

commands.title: Business Central Object Lookup: Reload Catalog

businessCentralObjectLookup.catalogPath.description: Optional workspace-relative or absolute path to an additional JSON catalog of Business Central objects.

businessCentralObjectLookup.scanWorkspac.description: Scan AL files and .app symbol packages in the current workspace.

businessCentralObjectLookup.includeBundl.description: Include the bundled sample catalog in addition to workspace and custom catalog results.
